tools.description: Query Godot class documentation. Use to confirm a class exists, its inheritance, methods, properties and signals.

tools.description: Query a method signature and description of a Godot class. Use to avoid inventing method parameters or return types.

tools.description: Full-text search local Godot documentation. Use when you are unsure of the exact class name, method name, or tutorial location.
